objective: Plan hardening for validation mutation, Codex hook install parity, .agents policy, canonical root cleanliness, release audit artifact scoping, and bd/Dolt boundedness.

tracker_health.reason: bd commands worked but one create emitted JSON and then timed out under gtimeout; plan includes soc-0qz1.7 to bound this behavior.

done_criteria: Fast validation leaves tracked .agents knowledge stable by default.
Installed Codex hooks source their helpers correctly from plugin cache.
Repo-local .agents lifecycle classifications are documented and enforced.
Canonical root dirty state is classified into generated, tracked-policy, user/operator edit, or unknown categories.
Release audit validation scopes historical local artifacts without weakening official target-release checks.
bd/Dolt closeout commands have portable timeout guidance and preserve emitted JSON on timeout.

test_levels.rationale: The initiative spans shell gates, install packaging, hook execution, Git/worktree behavior, release artifacts, docs contracts, and tracker behavior. Installed-plugin and closeout flows should get system-level proof.
